title: AgentClaims
description: Schema for claims/current.json — a top-level array of claim objects.

related_task.description: Task ID this claim is associated with.

claimed_status.description: The coverage/compliance status claimed by the agent.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting this claim.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim was made.

code_refs.description: Optional references to source code locations.

test_refs.description: Optional references to test file locations.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes from the agent.
